ecrets of Birth Time Rectification
Asc will change), question arises whether the previous
Paryantara could cause the same? The previous Paryantara
before Mo-Ra-Sa was Mo-Ra-Ju (20/6/2005 to 1/9/2005). Yes,
Ju also could have caused trouble to the leg as Ju is the lord
of Pi and the 12th lord (leg) from Asc. All these means that
BT is very close to 5.30 AM, but not after that (as the Asc
will change then). It also indicates that instead of trying to
locate all possible times of birth (between 4.47 to 5.3~) by
mathematical methods, I should effectively use those methods
in spotting apt possible moment close to 5.30 AM, which
sure reflects your life and state of affairs. This really prompts
me to look at prediction given for last Navamsa of Cp in
Saravali, since if the BT is close to 5.30 you could be born in
the last Navamsa ofCp. As per Saravali, the one born in the
last Navamsa ofCp is 'Kind hearted, love music (both vocal
and instruments), good looking, an~ love make relations with
